---
title: "Free Information Leads to Low-Quality Information"
description: "Menczer and Hills on social herding, echo chambers, and the limits of human attention."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-11-29"
categories: [social media, society, AI safety, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Information overload. Image from [Scientific American](https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/information-overload-helps-fake-news-spread-and-social-media-knows-it/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Insightful article from Filippo Menczer and Thomas Hills: free information leads to low-quality information.

Humans are not evolved to handle information overload well, and can easily fall into the traps of social herding and echo chambers. Proliferation of bots doesn't help.

SciAm article: <https://lnkd.in/gTCakrX>
Paper: <https://lnkd.in/gUyRzh6>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_insightful-article-from-filippo-menczer-and-activity-6738932934771904512-Hpof).*
